EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New Distributed Switch (VDS) ports are created on host {event_src.host}
The configuration of Distributed Switch (VDS) ports is changed on host {event_src.host}
The configuration of Distributed Switch (VDS) port {object.id} is changed on host {event_src.host}
Distributed Switch (VDS) ports are removed on host {event_src.host}
